headline: 5 Solid Stocks to Boost Your Portfolio as Retail Sales Continue to Surge
summary: Retail sales rose in June as online spending surged, highlighting AMZN, FIVE, DLTR, TGT and TJX as retail stocks to watch.

headline: The Great Rotation: 5 Stocks Set to Win as Money Leaves Megacap Tech
summary: Money is already walking out of megacap tech, and five names sitting in its path stand to collect while everyone else wonders what happened to last year's winners.
